response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates over 12 years of full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the role's primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). Her work includes scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail platform handling millions of requests), AI-agent infrastructure, and extensive backend/frontend development, with measurable impact. She also has deep expertise in cloud platforms, databases, and testing frameworks, along with leadership in architecture decisions and process improvements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with direct alignment to required stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
Proven track record building and scaling high-throughput systems (e.g., Direct Mail platform, real-time metadata services)
Deep expertise in cloud platforms (AWS), databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB), and AI-agent development infrastructure
concerns: Recent role (re:cinq) is very brief (April 2025–Present), limiting visibility into long-term contributions
Limited evidence of formal testing framework expertise (Vitest, Jest) in listed projects, though testing practices are mentioned
No explicit mention of Kubernetes or Docker in recent roles, despite cloud platform experience

key_factors.factor: Brief tenure in most recent role
